task.summary: Evaluate the implemented Czech static /ukazky pages for Radeq.cz, including public-safe showcase data, a local rule-based chatbot guide, sitemap/navigation updates, tests, and separate e-mail provider research.

model_or_worker.name: Codex GPT-5
model_or_worker.role: implementation, verification, governance update, and provider research synthesis

reasoning_profile.change_policy: Local product and governance edits only; no deploy, push, PR, DNS, Cloudflare, model API, checkout, payment, or provider mutation.

token_efficiency_profile.context_scope: Approved plan, Radeq project mesh, targeted Astro/React/data/test files, official e-mail provider pages, and redacted subagent summaries.

input_packet_summary.summary: Owner-approved Czech first wave for /ukazky with explicit no-model chatbot, no checkout/payment, old /demo retained, header nav only after tests, and e-mail provider research kept separate.

output_pointer.summary: Implemented static /ukazky hub and detail pages, typed showcase data, rule-based chatbot guide, sitemap and Czech header navigation, tests, and governance records.

prompt_or_input_delta.summary: Converted the approved static /ukazky plan into product code and added provider research as a parallel recommendation rather than a release blocker.
prompt_or_input_delta.rollback_path: Revert product files for /ukazky and remove this eval, work-log entry, and new mesh nodes/rules if owner rejects the implementation.

verification_evidence.evidence: npm.cmd run typecheck passed with 0 errors, warnings, or hints.
npm.cmd run build and DEPLOY_TARGET=github-pages npm.cmd run build both passed and generated 14 static pages; existing Vite chunk-size warning remained.
npm.cmd run test:e2e passed: 15 Playwright tests.
Local Playwright sanity check against http://127.0.0.1:4321 verified expected H1s, no style toggle, no desktop/mobile overflow, and explicit chatbot handoff.
Official provider pages were checked for Cloudflare Email Service, Fastmail, Google Workspace, Microsoft Exchange Online, Zoho Mail, Proton Mail, Resend, Formspree, and Basin.
